title: Ratty Mischief
description: A Simple Mod That Adds 5 Rat Variants To Minecraft
body: **Ratty Mischief** is a forge mod that adds **Rats** and **Cheese**. The mod has currently five rat types **(Black, Gray, Ginger, Albino And Brown)**.![All Five Rat Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/387062d0d9109d8e19f3eaf0c8bfd93bf31ae2a0.png)It also adds a **cheese wheel** that you can eat like a cake. This mod is just for those who would like some cute rat companions on their journey in Minecraft. The mod is just a very small project I work on for fun and will probably have more features in the future. The mod is made with **MCreator** and requires **Geckolib** to function.
